final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a Douyin (TikTok) live stream featuring a young woman known as "神仙姐姐".

Style/medium: needs a realistic live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact UI detail level is yours
Composition: must be a vertical 9:16 live-stream interface with the host centered, holding a sign in front of her
Subject: must include a young woman ("神仙姐姐") holding a handwritten sign facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: needs a typical indoor live-stream room backdrop — exact decor is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, flattering live-stream lighting atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include sign text "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" (on the physical sign the subject is holding); must include typical Douyin live-stream UI overlay elements (viewer count, comments, like icons, etc.)
Constraints: must preserve the Douyin live-stream UI frame around the scene; sign text must be clearly legible
Avoid: must avoid blurry or illegible sign text
